title: Heartstone: Connection
description: A Heartstone add-on,  which adds the Amulet of Connection that allows players to teleport to each other when in the inventory
body:
An add-on for Heartstone.

### Adds the **Amulet of Connection**, an item that comes in pairs and allows you to teleport to the player whom you've given the second amulet. - - - To craft the Amulet you need to combine 2 Heartstones and a Totem of Undying, after which you can fill it with Ender Pearls then use it to teleport! The cost of Ender Pearls to teleport scales with distance: - 0 - 999 Blocks: 1 Pearl - 1000 - 9,999: 2 Pearls - 10,000+: 3 Pearls If you need to link 2 Amulets with different ID numbers - combine them in a crafting table - - -
